svg.title: Phase 2: Route protection and authorization flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how edge middleware and server components protect the CMS dashboard route

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What request does the browser send to the middleware?')
sendPrompt('How does the edge middleware work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the session cookie is missing?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the cookie is present?')
sendPrompt('What does layout.js do to verify the session?')
sendPrompt('What does Firebase Admin SDK return from verifySessionCookie?')
sendPrompt('How is the Firestore user document fetched?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a user is inactive?')
sendPrompt('What data is shown on the dashboard?')

svg.text: Purple = client/server components Blue = Firebase services Teal = API/middleware Green = success Red = error/redirect
